43°33′N, 1°28′E · CENTRE NATIONAL D'ÉTUDES SPATIALES · TOULOUSE

France's civilian UAP office — every case since 1977.

GEIPAN at CNES is the world's longest-running official civilian UAP programme. 3,334 cases classified and published in the public database — every one of them browsable below. Tone: French blue.

§ Headlines · GEIPAN, distilled
Founded
1977
As GEPAN; renamed SEPRA (1988), GEIPAN (2005).
Total cases
3,334
Classified & published (scraped May 2026).
PAN A
23.70% — phenomenon perfectly identified.
PAN B
31.73% — phenomenon probably identified.
PAN C
25.25% — unidentified (insufficient data).
PAN D
2.55% — unidentified after full investigation.
§ Cases · Full database (search · filter · paginate)

Every classified case GEIPAN has published.

All 3,334 cases from the GEIPAN public database, plus the official methodology PDFs and sample case videos. Filter by PAN class (A/B/C/D), department, or observation year. Click any case → full investigative file on cnes-geipan.fr.

No records match.

GEIPAN Mirror

Offline archival mirror of GEIPAN at CNES — the entire public case database scraped & cached. Reusable under Loi n° 78-753.

Source: cnes-geipan.fr · scraped 2026.
